VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "GPT-4o System Card" exists at arXiv:2410.21276, published October 25, 2024, authored by OpenAI (Aaron Hurst, Adam Lerer, and 416 others). The cited authors and arXiv ID match exactly. The paper itself instructs readers to cite it as "OpenAI (2024)," which explains the "OpenAI" as first author in the citation — this is an acceptable large-team authorship shorthand.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.21276
